differential_diagnoses: Euglycemic diabetic ketoacidosis (secondary to SGLT2 inhibitor)
Acute kidney injury with multifactorial metabolic acidosis
next_steps: Calculate the anion gap and delta-delta ratio
Measure arterial blood gases and serum lactate level
Measure serum beta-hydroxybutyrate and plasma ketones
Perform urinary organic acid analysis (specifically checking for pyroglutamic acid/5-oxoproline)
Discontinue metformin and SGLT2 inhibitors (already likely ceased)
Monitor renal function closely and consider renal replacement therapy if acidosis is severe or refractory
